questionHtml:
The air in a pipe, open at both ends, vibrates in the second harmonic mode.

What is the phase difference between the motion of a particle at P and the motion of a particle at Q?

A.  0

B.  π2

C.  π

D.  2π

meta.title: The air in a pipe, open at both ends, vibrates in the second harmonic mode. What is the phase difference between the motion of a particle at P and the motion of a particle at Q? A.
